title: Reciprocal Communication between FAPs and Muscle Cells via Distinct Extracellular Vesicle miRNAs in Muscle Regeneration
author: meng, qingyong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1 Metadata: Introduction of experimental design and protocol 
 2 Known-miRNA map-MCEVPs: Small RNA reads from MC-EVPs were mapped against miRBase to identify known miRNAs. 
 3 Known-miRNA map-FAPEVPs: Small RNA reads from FAP-EVPs were mapped against miRBase to identify known miRNAs. 
 4 Readcount-TMP-1: The expression of known miRNAs was normalized by TPM (Transcripts per million). 
 5 FAP-EVPs vs MCEVPs. differential analysis: Differential expressed miRNAs were analyzed by DEGseq and filtered with qvalue<0.01 &&|log2(foldchange)|>1.
steps_raw:

 5 FAP-EVPs vs MCEVPs. differential analysis: Differential expressed miRNAs were analyzed by DEGseq and filtered with qvalue<0.01 &&|log2(foldchange)|>1.
